title: Order Bar Chart in chronological order
excerpt: I’m trying to set up a chart that will show billable time for each week of the year. Where I have a problem is that each week is placed in order as tasks, and the chart widget places them in alphabetical order, instead o…

posts.author: Patnard (Patrick Chenard)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to set up a chart that will show billable time for each week of the year. Where I have a problem is that each week is placed in order as tasks, and the chart widget places them in alphabetical order, instead of in the order I manually prepared. I tried writing the “Week #” first to force this, but W1 is followed by W10 instead of W2.

image2174×1113 64.5 KB

I think that more options should be available in the “sort by” dropdown. Board order, would help me here.

posts.author: MurrayK (Kari Murray )
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. I’d also like to see the ability to have the months of the year in the correct order. Or if I number them, to follow the numbers.

posts.author: KristinLeefromLHL (Kristin)
posts.cookedHtml: Definitely need this feature as I’m trying to view my data in a chronological way by month. It only lets you sort alphabetically or numerically which is really limiting.

posts.author: Eden (Eden)
posts.cookedHtml:
It must be.

An integral part of presenting data correctly.

posts.author: WeeMeng (Wee Meng Yeo)
posts.cookedHtml: hey monday.com team, any updates on this?
